title: 3 BHK Flat for Rent near Gokul Road
description: A fully furnished 3 BHK flat in a gated community close to Gokul Road IT corridor. Comes with a clubhouse, gym and children's play area. Ideal for working professionals and families who want a low-maintenance premium lifestyle.

faq.question: Is the flat furnished?
faq.answer: Yes, it is fully furnished including beds, sofa, wardrobes and kitchen appliances.

faq.question: Are pets allowed?
faq.answer: Yes, pets are allowed in this community.

faq.question: Is covered parking available?
faq.answer: Yes, one covered car parking slot is allotted.
